units.name: agent-storage-setup.service
units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=Create agent container storage directory
Before=mkube-agent.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
RemainAfterExit=yes
ExecStart=/usr/bin/mkdir -p /var/data/agent-storage

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

units.name: mkube-agent.service
units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=mkube job agent (container)
After=network-online.target agent-storage-setup.service
Wants=network-online.target
Requires=agent-storage-setup.service

[Service]
Type=simple
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
ExecStartPre=/bin/bash -c 'echo Waiting for DNS...; for i in $(seq 1 60); do getent hosts registry.gt.lo && exit 0; sleep 2; done; echo DNS timeout; exit 1'
ExecStartPre=-/usr/bin/podman rm -f mkube-agent
ExecStartPre=-/usr/bin/podman pull --tls-verify=false registry.gt.lo:5000/rawhidedev:latest
ExecStartPre=-/usr/bin/podman pull --tls-verify=false registry.gt.lo:5000/fedoradev:latest
ExecStart=/usr/bin/podman run --name mkube-agent --rm --network host --privileged -v /var/data:/data -v /var/data/agent-storage:/var/lib/containers -e MKUBE_API=http://192.168.200.2:8082 --pull=always registry.gt.lo:5000/mkube-agent:edge
ExecStop=/usr/bin/podman stop mkube-agent
TimeoutStartSec=900
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
